official_notes: Old report baseline only; target side had no revision priority.
Old report assessment: official reviewer passed the resume as substantively strong.
claude_notes: ATS-like insistence that Looker and semantic-layer signals appear as exact phrases in body text.
Exact year arithmetic concerns around 3+ years claims.
Summary framing judged too data-modeling-first rather than infrastructure/performance-first.

metadata.label: same/Google
metadata.title: Software Engineer III, Full Stack, Google Cloud Platforms
metadata.team_direction: Google is a leading technology company that develops next-generation technologies impacting billions of users

official_notes: Old report baseline only; target side had no revision priority.
Old report assessment: official reviewer passed the resume as substantively strong.
claude_notes: ATS-like insistence that Looker and semantic-layer signals appear as exact phrases in body text.
Exact year arithmetic concerns around 3+ years claims.
Summary framing judged too data-modeling-first rather than infrastructure/performance-first.

findings.issue: 首句以“Full-Stack Transition”开场，先讲转型过程而不是角色方向与领域信号，首屏抓手偏弱。
findings.fix: 把首句改成角色先行的 framing，例如先写“Full-Stack SWE”或“Backend/Platform-focused SWE”，再把“from data analysis”放到第二句或后半句。

findings.field: TikTok Experience > Project: Security Knowledge Retrieval Assistant, bullet 1
findings.issue: 正文出现了 `Bedrock`，但 Skills 里没有这个命名技术，造成“正文用到、Skills 无出处”的技术-叙事不一致。
findings.fix: 在 Skills 的 Cloud/Platform 区补上 `AWS Bedrock`，或者把该 bullet 改写为只使用已在 Skills 中列出的技术；不要保留正文有命名技术、Skills 里完全缺失的状态。

revision_priority: [MUST] 把 Summary 第一条改成角色先行的 full-stack framing，弱化或后移“transitioning from data analysis”的表述。
[MUST] 处理 TikTok 项目里 `Bedrock` 的技能出处不一致：要么补进 Skills，要么重写该 bullet 只保留已列出的技术。
[SHOULD] 如果目标继续对准 Google Cloud Platforms，补一条更明确的云平台/部署/监控/权限相关正文证据，而不是只在 Skills 里泛列云技术。
[NICE] 精简 Summary 第三句的 Go 成就表述，保留 cognition signal，但让首屏更快扫读。
raw_json.revision_instructions:
[MUST] 将 Professional Summary 第一条改成角色先行的开场，例如先写 Full-Stack/Platform-focused SWE，再把“from data analysis”放到后半句，避免首屏先看到转型叙事。
[MUST] 在 Skills 中补 `AWS Bedrock`，或把 TikTok 项目第一条改写为仅使用已列出的技术；当前正文出现命名技术但 Skills 无出处，会被 ATS/面试官直接追问。
[SHOULD] 若继续投 Google Cloud Platforms，建议在最相关经历里补 1 条更明确的云平台/部署/监控/权限证据，增强与岗位方向的桥接。
[NICE] 压缩 Summary 第三句的 Go 成绩描述，保留 pattern-recognition 信号即可。
